zh.Svanninge Sogn, Sallinge Herred, Svendbo: 丹麥斯文德波格薩林斯萬寧
zh.Glimminge, Walby,, Sweden: 瑞典可利斯安斯塔德潔雷斯塔德瓦利比格利明
zh.Minkwitz, Leising, Leipzig, Germany: 德國薩辛可萊斯 貝爾明可維次
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn於大約1334年出生在丹麥斯文德波格薩林斯萬寧時，她的父親Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn16歲，母親Hille Moltke Cortsdatter16歲。她於1363年與Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand在丹麥斯文德波格薩林斯萬寧結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn于大约1334年出生在丹麦斯文德波格薩林斯萬寧时，她的父亲Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn16岁，母亲Hille Moltke Cortsdatter16岁。她于1363年与Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand在丹麦斯文德波格薩林斯萬寧结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bjorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lars, Walfrid.

Danish and Norwegian (Bjørn); Swedish (Björn): from a personal name and nickname meaning ‘bear’ (Old Norse bjǫrn). The Norwegian name is often a shortened form of any of various habitational names from any of the places called with this word. In Swedish it is ornamental in some cases. Compare Ursin .

variants.name: Bjornstad
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Carsten, Erik, Fredrik, Peer.
Norwegian (Bjørnstad): habitational name from a farm named as ‘Bjørn's farm’ (see Bjorn ), of which there are many examples, especially in southeastern Norway.

variants.name: Ursin
meanings: Scandinavian (mainly Norwegian): Latinized (humanistic) form of a surname like Danish and Norwegian Bjørn (see Bjorn ) and Bjørnsen (see Bjornsen ), from Latin ursus ‘bear’.
French: variant, influenced by the Latin name Ursus, of Oursin, itself a derivative of Ours ‘bear’.

variants.name: Bjornson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorn, Erik, Sig, Arni, Berger, Birgit, Lars, Ove, Selmer, Thor.
Americanized form of Swedish Björnsson or its rare variant Björnson: patronymic from the personal name Björn (see Bjorn ).
Americanized form of Norwegian Bjørnsen, a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Bjornsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Steinar, Bjorn, Knut.  German Fritz, Hans.
Danish and Norwegian (Bjørnsen): patronymic from the personal name Bjørn (see Bjorn ). Compare Ursin .

nameMeanings.name: Helle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine short form of names ending in -helm, e.g. Friedhelm , Wilhelm .

variants.name: Helma
meanings: Feminine short form of names ending in -helm, e.g. Friedhelm , Wilhelm .

historicEvents.description: The Union of Kalmar unites Denmark, Sweden and Norway.
Copenhagen is declared the capital city.

en.lifeSummary: When Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn was born about 1334, in Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Denmark, her father, Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn, was 16 and her mother, Hille Moltke Cortsdatter, was 16. She married Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand in 1363, in Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn est née environ 1334, à Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Danemark, son père, Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Hille Moltke Cortsdatter, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand en 1363, à Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn um 1334 in Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn 16 und ihre Mutter Hille Moltke Cortsdatter 16. Sie hat 1363 in Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dänemark Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn è nata il circa 1334 nel Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Danimarca, sua padre, Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Hille Moltke Cortsdatter, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand nel 1363, nel Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Helle Olufsdatter Bjornが約1334年にデンマークスベンドボルグサリンッジスヴァニンッジで生まれた時，父Oluf Bjornsen Bjornは16歳，母Hille Moltke Cortsdatterは16歳であった。1363年にデンマークスベンドボルグサリンッジスヴァニンッジでGert Minckwitz Ulfstandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn(이)가 대략 1334년 덴마크 스븐드볼그 샐링 스반잉에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hille Moltke Cortsdatter(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1363년 덴마크 스븐드볼그 샐링 스반잉에서 Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn nasceu aproximadamente 1334, em Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dinamarca, seu pai, Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Hille Moltke Cortsdatter, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand em 1363, em Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn родилась около 1334 г. в местности сваннинг, саллинг, свендборг, Дания, её отцу по имени Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Hille Moltke Cortsdatter, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand в 1363 г. в местности сваннинг, саллинг, свендборг, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helle Olufsdatter Bjorn nació aproximadamente 1334, en Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dinamarca, su papá, Oluf Bjornsen Bjorn, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Hille Moltke Cortsdatter, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Gert Minckwitz Ulfstand en 1363, en Svanninge, Sallinge, Svendborg, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
